summary: Local Party Payment feature fully tested. All 17 backend tests PASSED (100%). Frontend UI tests PASSED - Local Party tab, party cards, settle dialog, manual purchase dialog, export buttons all working correctly.

1_local_party_summary_api.description: Returns party-wise balance summary with grand totals

2_local_party_transactions_api.description: Returns all transactions, filterable by party_name, kms_year, season

3_manual_purchase_api.description: Adds manual purchase (debit) entry for local party

4_settle_api.description: Settles/pays a party, auto-creates Cash Book nikasi entry

5_delete_transaction_api.description: Deletes transaction, cascades to linked cash_book entry for settlements

6_excel_export.description: Exports local party data to Excel with summary and transactions

7_pdf_export.description: Exports local party data to PDF with tables and styling

8_mill_parts_stock_edit.description: Edits mill parts entry, auto-updates linked local party entry

9_mill_parts_auto_create_local_party.description: Stock In with party_name auto-creates local party debit entry (source_type=mill_part)

10_source_type_badges.description: Source types correctly set: manual, mill_part, gunny_bag, settlement

13_frontend_manual_purchase_dialog.location: Payments > Local Party > Manual Purchase button

14_frontend_mill_parts_edit.description: Edit button present on stock entries, opens edit dialog

seed_data_used.bicky: Debit Rs.6000, Paid Rs.2500, Balance Rs.3500 (from manual + mill_part + settlement)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Local Party Payment feature fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: /api/local-party/summary (GET), /api/local-party/transactions (GET), /api/local-party/manual (POST), /api/local-party/settle (POST), /api/local-party/{id} (DELETE), /api/local-party/excel (GET), /api/local-party/pdf (GET). Mill parts stock edit (PUT /api/mill-parts-stock/{id}) auto-updates linked local party entries. Settlement auto-creates Cash Book nikasi entry with linked_local_party_id. Delete settlement cascades to delete Cash Book entry. Source types: manual, mill_part, gunny_bag, settlement. UI in Payments > Local Party tab.

api_summary.POST /api/local-party/settle: Pay party + auto Cash Book nikasi
api_summary.DELETE /api/local-party/{id}: Delete + cascade to Cash Book if settlement
